I...should look up how witch teams work....
Purple realm puts the first card you play in a box and activates its Transition/teleport/warp effect.
After 5 cards are boxed, instead of ending your turn normally, you will get an extra turn
All transition/warp/teleport effects will activate on this turn, even if they are not played first
